scripts.build: npm run build -w @allegato-a1/shared && npm run build -w @allegato-a1/web && npm run build -w @allegato-a1/pdf-service
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @allegato-a1/shared && concurrently -n shared,web,pdf -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @allegato-a1/shared" "npm run dev -w @allegato-a1/web" "npm run dev -w @allegato-a1/pdf-service"
